TV Series.title: Hoarders
TV Series.overview: This series delves into the mental disorder of hoarding, as experts work to help individuals overcome obsessive collecting and reclaim their lives.

TV Series.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
TV Series.overview: Karl Pilkington shares his curious views as Ricky Gervais and Stephen Merchant riff on them hilariously in this animated adaptation of the hit podcast.

TV Series.title: Toriko
TV Series.overview: The world is full of deliciously deadly ingredients that the wealthiest appetites in existence can't wait to devour. Toriko, the legendary Gourmet Hunter, is ready and willing to track down the rarest animals on the planet and put them on a plate!

TV Series.title: Phantom Lawyer
TV Series.overview: Possessed lawyer hunts the truth behind eerie cases to deliver thrilling justice for the vengeful dead!

TV Series.title: That Night
TV Series.overview: When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

TV Series.title: This Is Us
TV Series.overview: Follows the Pearson family through decades and three generations, touching upon their triumphs, struggles, loves, losses, and more.

TV Series.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
TV Series.overview: The life of the shinobi is beginning to change. Boruto Uzumaki, son of Seventh Hokage Naruto Uzumaki, has enrolled in the Ninja Academy to learn the ways of the ninja. Now, as a series of mysterious events unfolds, Boruto’s story is about to begin!

TV Series.title: Bitten
TV Series.overview: 25-year-old Elena Michaels is desperate for a normal human life. But things have been complicated since she became the world’s only female werewolf.

TV Series.title: One-Punch Man
TV Series.overview: The most powerful superhero in the world can kill anyone with one blow. But nothing can challenge him, so he struggles with ennui and depression.

TV Series.title: The Office Movers
TV Series.overview: Held together with packing tape and a dream, two brothers reluctantly start an office-moving business, intending to build it, sell it and cash out.

TV Series.title: Blue Therapy
TV Series.overview: Seven couples move out of their comfort zones and onto the therapist's couch to try and work through their relationship issues in this reality series.

TV Series.title: Son of a Critch
TV Series.overview: Mark, a boy much older inside than his 11 years, uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and to connect with the small collection of people in his limited world.

TV Series.title: The Man in the High Castle
TV Series.overview: In a world where Nazi Germany and Imperial Japan won WWII and control the US, a woman sees a film showing a different reality, inspiring her to resist.

TV Series.title: Pursuit of Jade
TV Series.overview: A humble woman marries a disgraced noble to protect her family, but as their love becomes real, she follows him into battle to fight for their future.

TV Series.title: Girl from Nowhere: The Reset
TV Series.overview: In a new universe, the mysterious Nanno poses as a transfer student, exposing cruelty by turning power, guilt and desire against those who abuse them.

TV Series.title: K-Pop Idols
TV Series.overview: Glitz meets grit as up-and-coming stars give everything to an art form that demands perfection.

TV Series.title: Boyfriend on Demand
TV Series.overview: Seo Mi-rae is worn out by work. Love? It's the last thing on her mind. But a virtual dating service sparks feelings — and maybe a real shot at romance.

TV Series.title: Vladimir
TV Series.overview: When an English professor becomes obsessed with a handsome new colleague, her already complicated marriage and career are thrown into total chaos.

TV Series.title: The TikTok Killer
TV Series.overview: This documentary follows a family's quest for the truth when a 42-year-old woman disappears in Spain — after meeting a popular TikToker while traveling.

TV Series.title: Hello Bachhon
TV Series.overview: A physics teacher sets out to make quality education accessible to all students through online learning. Based on a true story.

TV Series.title: The Dinosaurs
TV Series.overview: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.

Movies.title: Anatomy of a Fall
Movies.overview: When Samuel is found dead, the police question if he was murdered or if he committed suicide and his wife Sandra becomes the main suspect. The investigation leads to an unsettling journey into the depths of their conflicted relationship.

Movies.title: The Bad Guys 2
Movies.overview: In this new action-packed chapter, the now-reformed Bad Guys are forced to pull one last heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals: The Bad Girls.

Movies.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
Movies.overview: The war is over, but revenge is not. In this sequel, Aatami seeks to rebuild his life, but the Red Army turns his journey into a bloody hunt by releasing the man who massacred his family.

Movies.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
Movies.overview: A criminal mastermind unleashes a twisted form of justice in this terrifying new chapter from the book of SAW, starring Chris Rock, Max Minghella, and Samuel L. Jackson.

Movies.title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
The Creator
Movies.overview: As a future war between the human race and artificial intelligence rages on, ex-special forces agent Joshua is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI. The Creator has developed a mysterious weapon that has the power to end the war and all of mankind. As Joshua and his team of elite operatives venture into enemy-occupied territory, they soon discover the w

Movies.title: In a Relationship
Movies.overview: Over the course of a summer in LA, steadfast couple Owen and Hallie stare down the end of their relationship while Matt and Willa are just beginning.

Movies.title: Small Time Crooks
Movies.overview: A bungling ex-con and dishwasher and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank heist's cover business next door becomes a spectacular success.

Movies.title: The Bad Guardian
Movies.overview: A dedicated daughter must find the strength to save her father from the clutches of a corrupt and greedy court-appointed "guardian.”

Movies.title: The Plastic Detox
Movies.overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

Movies.title: There There
Movies.overview: Through fleeting connection and confronting isolation, seven people search for meaning in their modern, intertwining relationships.

Movies.title: Vengeance
Movies.overview: A journalist travels from New York City to West Texas to investigate his ex-girlfriend’s death while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

Movies.title: BlackBerry
Movies.overview: The riveting true story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic demise of the world's first smartphone, BlackBerry is a whirlwind ride through the ruthlessly competitive forces of Silicon Valley at breakneck speeds.

Movies.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
Movies.overview: Morgan and Rodney were childhood sweethearts and married young. The couple separates, and Morgan's life begins to turn around, until Rodney gets diagnosed with cancer.

Movies.title: Nobody 2
Movies.overview: Bob Odenkirk returns as Hutch, an overworked assassin who just needs a break, in this bare-knuckle action-thriller. After deciding to take his family to a tourist town for some fun in the sun, a minor encounter with local bullies yanks the family into the crosshairs of an unhinged, blood-thirsty crime boss who is determined to derail his relaxation.

Movies.title: Agnes
Movies.overview: Rumors of demonic possession at a religious convent prompts a church investigation into the strange goings-on among its nuns. A disaffected priest and his neophyte are confronted with temptation, bloodshed and a crisis of faith.

Movies.title: Raazi
Movies.overview: Set in 1971, when the winds of war were blowing between India and Pakistan, Raazi – an adaptation of Harinder Sikka’s novel “Calling Sehmat” – is a true-life story involving a 20 year old Kashmiri girl.

Movies.title: A Miracle
Movies.overview: A young woman who claims she can heal the sick after seeing the Virgin Mary becomes a source of devotion and derision as believers flock to her.

Movies.title: The Walk
Movies.overview: In 1974, French high-wire artist Philippe Petit risks everything to walk between the Twin Towers, turning a dream into a breathtaking reality.

Movies.title: The Retirement Plan
Movies.overview: When Ashley and her daughter Sarah get caught up in a criminal enterprise that puts them at risk, she turns to the only person who can help: her estranged father Matt (Nicholas Cage). As Ashley, Sarah, and Matt become entangled in an increasingly dangerous web, Ashley quickly learns her father had a secret past that she knew nothing about and that there is more to her father than meets the eye.

Movies.title: She's the Man
Movies.overview: When her brother decides to ditch school for a couple weeks, Viola heads over to his elite boarding school, disguised as him, and unexpectedly falls for one of his soccer teammates.

Movies.title: The Lost City of Z
Movies.overview: The Lost City of Z tells the incredible true story of British explorer Percy Fawcett, who journeys into the Amazon at the dawn of the 20th century and discovers evidence of a previously unknown, advanced civilization that may have once inhabited the region.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
Movies.overview: Coriolanus is the last hope for his failing lineage, the Snow family that has fallen from grace in a post-war Capitol. With his livelihood threatened, Snow is assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird, a tribute from the impoverished District 12.

Movies.title: Silverado
Movies.overview: In the 1800s Old West, an unlikely band of misfit friends teams up in a shoot-em-up against a frontier town’s crooked sheriff and his henchmen.

Movies.title: Saw X
Movies.overview: The chilling SAW X sees John Kramer seeking a cure for his cancer and finding con artists instead, making Jigsaw's game personal…and his ingenious traps more terrifying than ever.

Movies.title: PAW Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
Movies.overview: The Duke of Flappington takes the Princess' gem and uses its magical powers to raise Barkingburg into the sky! Skye will need to overcome her biggest fears and lead the team in their biggest aerial rescue yet! Get ready to JET TO THE RESCUE!

Movies.title: Battle: Los Angeles
Movies.overview: Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon take on an enemy unlike any they've ever encountered when hostile alien invaders attack the planet in this epic sci-fi action film.

Movies.title: Sniper: Legacy
Movies.overview: A rogue gunman is assassinating high-ranking military officers one by one. When Gunnery Sgt. Brandon Beckett (Chad Michael Collins, Sniper: Reloaded) is informed his father, legendary shooter Thomas Beckett (Tom Berenger) has been killed, Brandon springs into action to take out the perpetrator. But when his father rescues him from an ambush, Brandon realizes he’s a pawn being played by his...

Movies.title: Transformers One
Movies.overview: Witness the untold origin story of Orion Pax (young Optimus Prime) and D-16 (young Megatron). Once brothers-in-arms, see how they turn into sworn enemies and forever change the fate of Cybertron.

Movies.title: The Grinch
Movies.overview: The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

Movies.title: One More Shot
Movies.overview: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union Address.

Movies.title: Drive-Away Dolls
Movies.overview: Ethan Cohen directs this comedy where friends Jamie and Marian go on an impromptu road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start. But things go south when they cross paths with a group of inept criminals along the way.

Movies.title: The Lego Batman Movie
Movies.overview: Batman works together with his sidekick, Robin, and the police commissioner's daughter, Barbara, to foil Joker's plans of taking over Gotham City.

Movies.title: The Book of Clarence
Movies.overview: Jerusalem, year 33. Pursuing a better life for himself and his family, Clarence (LaKeith Stanfield) decides to take advantage of the impact of Jesus Christ and become a new Messiah, risking everything along the way.

Movies.title: The 6th Day
Movies.overview: In the future, a corporation has begun illegally cloning humans. They mistakenly clone the wrong man, who is now the only one who could expose them.

Movies.title: Point Break
Movies.overview: A young FBI agent, Johnny Utah, infiltrates a team of thrill-seeking elite athletes – led by the charismatic Bodhi. Deep undercover, and with his life in danger, Utah strives to prove they are the architects of a string of inconceivable crimes.

Movies.title: RED
Movies.overview: Retired assassins are targeted for death in this comic action adventure.

Movies.title: 2 Hearts
Movies.overview: For two couples the future unfolds in different decades and different places, but a hidden connection will bring them together in a way no one could have predicted.

Movies.title: Frida
Movies.overview: Salma Hayek gives a passionate, Oscar®-nominated performance in this biographical drama about Mexican painter Frida Kahlo.

Movies.title: Two Days Before Christmas
Movies.overview: A writer, a pop star and their families weather snowstorms, mounting career crises and intertwining love lives across Quebec two days before Christmas.

Movies.title: Beverly Hills Cop
Movies.overview: The heat is on in this fast paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friends killer in Beverly Hills.

Movies.title: Genie
Movies.overview: With his life unraveling around him, Bernard dusts off a jewelry box and unintentionally releases genie Flora, who might just be able to help him.

Movies.title: Deliver Us from Evil
Movies.overview: A New York police officer and unconventional priest join forces to investigate a series of disturbing and inexplicable crimes.

Movies.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
Movies.overview: Dive into the turbulent waters of high school with this heartwarming action comedy about a shy teenager who discovers that she's part of a legendary royal lineage of mythical sea krakens and that her destiny, in the depths of the oceans, is bigger than she ever dreamed.

Movies.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
Movies.overview: In this fully animated, all-new take on the Smurfs, a mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends Brainy, Clumsy, and Hefty on an exciting race through the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

Movies.title: Sex and the City 2
Movies.overview: When the combination of marriage and motherhood approaches, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi.

Movies.title: The Unknown Country
Movies.overview: An unexpected invitation launches a grieving young woman on a road trip through the American Midwest. While navigating an increasingly surreal landscape, with the help of familiar faces and strangers, she reconciles the losses of her past and the dreams of her future.

Movies.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
Movies.overview: Security guard Paul Blart takes his daughter to Las Vegas and stumbles upon a heist.

Movies.title: Talvar
Movies.overview: A double murder case of a teenage girl and the family's domestic help shakes the nation. With many suspects and multiple theories, who is the real culprit?

Movies.title: Legion
Movies.overview: A group of strangers become unwitting soldiers on the frontlines of the Apocalypse, protecting a woman and her unborn child from a demonic siege.

Movies.title: Fifty Shades Freed
Movies.overview: Believing they've left behind the shadowy figures from the past, billionaire Christian Grey and his new wife, Anastasia, fully embrace their inextricable connection and shared life of luxury. Just as the Greys begin to step into their new roles, sinister events come to light and jeopardize their happy ending before it even begins.

Movies.title: Concussion
Movies.overview: Based on the true story of American immigrant Dr. Bennet Omalu, who made the first discovery of a football-related brain trauma in a pro-player. His quest for the truth puts him at odds with the NFL in this incredible David vs Goliath tale.

Movies.title: Love and Monsters
Movies.overview: A young man and his traveling companions battle an array of monsters during an epic, 80-mile journey to find the woman he loves.

Movies.title: Journey to Bethlehem
Movies.overview: Celebrate the timeless story of Mary and Joseph and the birth of Jesus in an epic Christmas musical.

Movies.title: Surf's Up
Movies.overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the annual Penguin World Surfing Championship, and its newest participant, up-and-comer Cody Maverick.

Movies.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
Movies.overview: Axel Foley journeys back to Beverly Hills for a thrill ride at the Wonderworld amusement park! Axel becomes the hottest new attraction as he chases down the bad guys on the rides, through the shows and in the underground maze beneath the park.

Movies.title: Princess Mononoke
Movies.overview: Inflicted with a deadly curse, the young warrior Ashitaka heads west in search of a cure. There, he stumbles into a bitter conflict between Lady Eboshi, the proud people of Iron Town, and the enigmatic Princess Mononoke, a young girl raised by wolves, who will stop at nothing to prevent the humans from destroying her home and the forest spirits and animal gods who live there.

Movies.title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
Movies.overview: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

Movies.title: Ginger & Rosa
Movies.overview: In 1962 London, the lifelong friendship between two teenagers dissolves after one seduces the other's father.

Movies.title: The Bling Ring
Movies.overview: Based on true events. In the fame-obsessed world of Los Angeles, a group of teenagers take us on a thrilling and disturbing crime spree in the Hollywood Hills. Living the dream, one heist at a time.

Movies.title: My Boo 2
Movies.overview: Using his new ability to time-travel, a man visits different eras in search of past incarnations of his lover — the ghost haunting his modern-day home.

Movies.title: The Lego Movie
Movies.overview: An ordinary Lego construction worker, thought to be the prophesied 'Special', is recruited to join a quest to stop an evil tyrant from gluing the Lego universe into eternal stasis.

Movies.title: With Love
Movies.overview: When old schoolmates meet on a blind date, they resolve to reconnect with past flames and express unspoken feelings, while growing closer to each other.

Movies.title: The Captive
Movies.overview: Matthew must live through a parent’s worst nightmare when his daughter Cassandra vanishes without a trace. Years later, when detectives discover recent images of Cassandra online, Matthew puts everything on the line to get his daughter back.

Movies.title: Sleepwalkers
Movies.overview: After fleeing California, a mother and son settle in Indiana, stalking a local virgin as their target until their fixation upends the town.

Movies.title: 21 Bridges
Movies.overview: An embattled NYPD detective, is thrust into a citywide manhunt for a pair of cop killers after uncovering a massive and unexpected conspiracy. As the night unfolds, lines become blurred on who he is pursuing, and who is in pursuit of him.

Movies.title: A Man Called Ove
Movies.overview: When a boisterous Persian family, including a pregnant woman, moves next door to the neighborhood’s grumpy old man, unexpected love and kinship bloom.

Movies.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
Movies.overview: When innocent coed reporter, Anastasia Steele, interviews the mysterious, fabulously wealthy young corporate mogul Christian Grey, she finds herself caught under the spell of his intensely erotic BDSM games.

Movies.title: Chef
Movies.overview: When Chef Carl Casper quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant, he is left to figure out what’s next. Taking to the road, Chef Carl goes back to his roots to reignite his passion for the kitchen - and zest for life and love.

Movies.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog
Movies.overview: After their tiny red puppy grows into a 25-foot giant, a young girl and her uncle must protect their lovable new pet from an evil genetics company.

Movies.title: The Great Waldo Pepper
Movies.overview: Academy Award-winner Robert Redford is the great Waldo Pepper, a biplane pilot who finds fame and glory as a barnstormer who recreates infamous WWI dog fights.

Movies.title: Fifty Shades Darker
Movies.overview: Jamie Dornan and Dakota Johnson return as Christian Grey and Anastasia Steele in Fifty Shades Darker, the second chapter based on the worldwide bestselling “Fifty Shades” phenomenon. When a wounded Christian Grey tries to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian’s past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

Movies.title: Matilda
Movies.overview: Matilda is a super-smart little girl who's woefully misunderstood by her parents, her brother, and an evil school principal. But with the help of a brave best friend and a wonderful teacher, Matilda discovers she doesn't have to get mad to get even.

Movies.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
Movies.overview: It's time to say goodbye…When Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal and the family faces financial trouble, the entire household grapples with the threat of social disgrace. The Crawleys must embrace change as the staff prepares for a new chapter with the next generation leading Downton Abbey into the future.

Movies.title: Strangers in the Park
Movies.overview: A former communist militant and a "live and let live" man form an unlikely friendship on a park bench, sharing their life stories with humor and heart.

Movies.title: Trolls
Movies.overview: Optimistic trolls leader Poppy and her polar opposite Branch embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world they've ever known.

Movies.title: Harry Styles: The Story of His Life
Movies.overview: Harry Styles premieres "Kiss All The Time. Disco, Occasionally" in a one-off, epic showcase of his fourth album from Manchester. It's time to dance!

Movies.title: Nuremberg
Movies.overview: A WWII psychiatrist evaluates Nazi leaders before the Nuremberg trials, growing increasingly obsessed with understanding evil as he forms a disturbing bond with Hermann Göring.

Movies.title: War Machine
Movies.overview: An Army Ranger candidate and his team encounter an otherworldly killing machine in this action movie starring Alan Ritchson ("Reacher") and Dennis Quaid.

Movies.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
Movies.overview: Creators, special guests and stars — including Cillian Murphy — unpack the "Peaky Blinders" saga in this official companion podcast for the new film.
